tactics.stateBefore:
f g h : ℝ → ℝ
hf : Tendsto f (𝓝 8) (𝓝 (-3))
hg : Tendsto g (𝓝 8) (𝓝 5)
hh : Tendsto h (𝓝 8) (𝓝 2)
⊢ Tendsto (fun x => g x * h x - f x) (𝓝 8) (𝓝 13)
⊢ (deriv fun x => 2 * sin x + 5 * arccos x) = fun x => 2 * cos x - 5 / √(1 - x ^ 2)
⊢ (deriv fun x => x ^ 3 * Real.log (x ^ 5)) = fun x => 3 * x ^ 2 * Real.log (x ^ 5) + 5 * x ^ 2
⊢ Tendsto (fun x => rexp x / x ^ 5) atTop atTop

x C : ℝ
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ), sin (Real.log x) = x / 2 * (sin (Real.log x) - cos (Real.log x)) + C
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in 0 ..3, Real.log (x ^ 2 + 1) = 3 * Real.log 10 - 6 + 2 * arctan 3

x C : ℝ
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ), cos x * sin (2 * x) = -(2 / 3) * cos x ^ 3 + C

a : ℕ → ℝ
h : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc 0 π, ∑' (n : ℕ), a n * sin (↑n * x) = 1
⊢ a 3 = 4 / (3 * π)
⊢ Tendsto (fun a => ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..1, Real.log x / x) (𝓝[>] 0) atBot

⊢ let sec := fun x => 1 / cos x;
  ∫ (θ : ℝ) in 0 ..π / 4, √(sec θ ^ 2 + deriv (fun θ => sec θ) θ ^ 2) = 1

θ : ℝ
⊢ Complex.cos ↑θ = (Complex.exp (Complex.I * ↑θ) + Complex.exp (-Complex.I * ↑θ)) / 2

x : ℝ
⊢ Complex.cos (Complex.I * ↑x) = ↑(cosh x) ∧ Complex.sin (Complex.I * ↑x) = Complex.I * ↑(sinh x)

x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂ : ℝ
h₁ : x₁ * y₁ = 1
h₂ : x₂ * y₂ = 1
⊢ (x₁ + x₂) / 2 * ((y₁ + y₂) / 2) ≥ 1

x y : ℝ
⊢ HasDerivAt (fun x0 => Real.log (x0 + 2 * y)) (1 / (x + 2 * y)) x ∧
    HasDerivAt (fun y0 => Real.log (x + 2 * y0)) (2 / (x + 2 * y)) y
